---
title: "How to tag PDF in Latex"
author: ''
date: "2026-02-11"
slug: "how-to-tag-pdf-in-latex"
categories: []
tags: []
---

With the help of ChatGPT, I finally learn how to add tag in PDF via Latex:

- The tagged file is `Lec7` in Sides folder of `stat250_Spr26`;

There are two ways to run the tagged file:

- In `bash`: `lualatex Lec7_dispersion_handout_tagged.tex`

- In `RStudio` : `tinytex::latexmk("Lec7_dispersion_handout_tagged.tex", engine = "lualatex")`
